title: lasiostoma formicarum
intro: Lasiostoma formicarum, a perennial herbaceous plant, is a member of the plant family Gentianaceae, also known as the gentian family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lasiostoma formicarum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cultures, it is also used to make herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
